languages.text: {n}Ваши слова заставляют толпу притихнуть. Двое калек, вышедших вперед, рассеяно переглядываются, после чего начинают опасливо пятиться прочь.{/n}
{n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши слова заставляют толпу притихнуть. Двое калек, вышедших вперед, рассеяно переглядываются, после чего начинают опасливо пятиться прочь.{/n}

{n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}
{n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの言葉で、群れは静まり返った。前に出て来た二人の傷ついた男は、互いに見つめ合う。そして、警戒しながら後ろに下がる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの言葉で、群れは静まり返った。前に出て来た二人の傷ついた男は、互いに見つめ合う。そして、警戒しながら後ろに下がる。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sözlerin, kalabalığın sessizliğe bürünmesine neden oluyor. Öne çıkan iki sakat adam, boş gözlerle birbirlerine bakıyor ve ardından temkinli bir şekilde geri çekilmeye başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sözlerin, kalabalığın sessizliğe bürünmesine neden oluyor. Öne çıkan iki sakat adam, boş gözlerle birbirlerine bakıyor ve ardından temkinli bir şekilde geri çekilmeye başlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tus palabras hacen enmudecer a la multitud. Los dos hombres tullidos que se habían adelantado intercambian una mirada inexpresiva antes de empezar a retroceder con cautela.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tus palabras hacen enmudecer a la multitud. Los dos hombres tullidos que se habían adelantado intercambian una mirada inexpresiva antes de empezar a retroceder con cautela.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的话语让人群陷入了死寂。那两名带头的残疾男子茫然地对视一眼，随即开始警惕地向后退去。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的话语让人群陷入了死寂。那两名带头的残疾男子茫然地对视一眼，随即开始警惕地向后退去。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre déclaration fait retomber le silence sur la foule. Les deux hommes estropiés qui vous ont présenté leur demande échangent un regard inexpressif avant de commencer à reculer avec méfiance.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words cause the crowd to fall silent. The two crippled men who came forward look blankly at each other before beginning to back away warily.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre déclaration fait retomber le silence sur la foule. Les deux hommes estropiés qui vous ont présenté leur demande échangent un regard inexpressif avant de commencer à reculer avec méfiance.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Worte lassen die Menge verstummen. Die zwei versehrten Männer, die vorgetreten waren, sehen einander mit leerem Blick an und ziehen sich dann zögernd zurück.{/n}
